Effect: A cursed Item that will explode randomly upon being damaged. It will always leave you at 1 HP.

A cursed Item that will eat other Items and Field Magics in your Inventory, until there is no Items or Field Magics left, at which point it will fly away. *NOTE: The Big Bug can eat Cursed Items, but only if you have other items in your inventory.

A letter that is owned by the Reaper. You can pay half your current G to get rid of it. If your bag is sealed, or you are in debt, you can't get rid of it. Dying by this has terrible death effects. Not only are you dead for 3 days, but the Reaper guaranteed takes away a piece of equipment, ALL Money, ALL Items, ALL Field Magic, or TWO towns. If you die before the Blackmail takes effect, it will disappear from your inventory. You can avoid death from the Blackmail if you have a Revival in your inventory, you are an Acrobat with the Play Dead field skill or you have an Angel Choker, though its not very reliable.
